task: Scrub the table with a brush
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white table has a blue brush with yellow bristles and a brown bottle. The brush has a handle and bristles; the bottle is a container. STRATEGY - First, grasp the brush to enable scrubbing. Then, perform a scrubbing motion across the table surface. Finally, release the brush. Failure modes include dropping the brush or not making contact with the table. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the brush handle for a secure grip; Step 2 grasp the handle to lift the brush; Step 3 transport the brush to the table surface; Step 4 scrub by moving the bristles across the table; Step 5 release the brush.**

Goal: scrubbed(table); released(brush)
Scene: table, brush, bottle
Step 1: reach(brush)
  affordance_region: the handle of the blue brush
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, brush, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, brush) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(brush)
  affordance_region: the handle of the blue brush
  contact: holding(brush) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(brush)
Step 3: transport(brush -> table)
  affordance_region: the surface of the white table
  spatial: above(brush, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(brush)
  done_when: above(brush, table, 0.05)
Step 4: scrub(brush)
  affordance_region: the bristles of the blue brush
  contact: surface_contact(brush, table) [completion]; moved(brush) [completion]
  pose: scrubbed(table) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(brush, table) AND moved(brush)
Step 5: release(brush)
  affordance_region: the surface of the white table
  contact: released(brush) [completion]
  pose: released(brush) [completion]
  done_when: released(brush)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the handle of the blue brush
the handle of the blue brush
the surface of the white table
the bristles of the blue brush
the surface of the white table
